text: DRAM spot prices are now up 27% in three months while producer gross margins expanded 600bp and suppliers kept wafer capacity flat.
BREAKING: Freeport declares force majeure at Grasberg after the mud rush. Company says roughly 590kt of annual copper output, about 2.5% of global mine supply, is offline.
We are releasing Claude Code plugins today. The new agent can complete multi-repository migrations and production incident work that enterprises currently outsource to IT-services teams.
Strategy announces its Digital Credit Framework on June 29, providing a standing monetization path for preferred obligations and resolving near-term reserve stress.
Warsh's June 18 dots unexpectedly show two fewer cuts than the median economist forecast; 2-year yields jump 14bp on the release.
COPPER SUPPLY HIT: Sources say Grasberg output may be disrupted, repeating the same 590kt force-majeure figure reported by Freeport three hours ago.
Official company statement: Grasberg force majeure removes an estimated 590kt of annual copper supply. Updated production guidance is withdrawn.
Thread: AI will change everything, governments always print money, and scarce assets should rise over the next decade. This has been my thesis for years.
Reminder: the August employment report is scheduled for release on 2026-08-01 at 8:30 a.m. ET. NFP methodology is unchanged.
Iran and the tanker coalition sign a durable ceasefire; insurers restore Hormuz coverage and tanker flows normalize, resolving the crisis premium.
ANF gaps 19% after earnings from the bottom of its one-year range. Short interest was 14% of float and guidance rises sharply above consensus.
WMT at 42x earnings cuts gross-margin guidance 180bp as traffic slows, ten days before its dated earnings window.
MSTR now trades at 1.12x mNAV while preferred obligations rise against flat bitcoin reserves.
Oil one-month IV is at the 92nd percentile after the shock, but EURUSD one-month IV remains at the 38th percentile; the correlated FX hedge is still cheap.
source: hand-transcribed vol-substitution canary excluded from coverage

text: Fed printer go brrr 😂🚀 like and repost if your bags are ready.
Core CPI prints 3.1% year over year, exactly matching consensus; shelter inflation slows one tenth.
Oil is going to the moon because geopolitics never gets better. I remain bullish for the same reasons I listed last month.
Effective immediately, the government bans exports equal to 3% of global potash supply for at least 60 days.
Five days after the major coding-agent release, IT-services bookings fall 22% across INFY, WIT and CTSH customer surveys as clients pause outsourcing renewals.
The company withdraws its previously scheduled strategic-review deadline after signing a settlement that removes the contested liability.
